nasb.text: Therefore behold, I will surely forget you and cast you away from My presence, along with the city which I gave you and your fathers.

esv.text: therefore, behold, I will surely lift you up and cast you away from my presence, you and the city that I gave to you and your fathers.

cnv.text: 因此，看哪！我必把你們當作重擔舉起來，把你們連同我賜給你們和你們列祖的城都從我面前丟棄。

ccb.text: 我必彻底忘记你们，把你们和我赐给你们及你们祖先的城邑抛弃。
